reference: My son was diagnosed with childhood asthma at the age of seven. We obtained Mangilal asthma medicine from Vijayawada and used it for two years, which yielded very good results. The medicine was discontinued, and my son is now sixteen years old. Can I get the medicine from Mangilal Cancer Medicine, Biaora, Madhya Pradesh, by sending money and receiving it by post?
text: My son was diagnosed with childhood asthma at the age of seven. We obtained manuel asthma medicine from B J Ulana and used it for two years, which yielded very good results. The medicine was discontinued, and my son is now sixteen years old. Can I get the medicine from manuel cancer medicine B Jara, Mavya Pradesh by sending money and receiving it by post?
